project.objective: Determine the date and place of death of Elijah Wilkins (b. c. 1814, Muhlenberg County, Kentucky), last documented alive in the 1870 census

questions.question: When and where did Elijah Wilkins (b. c. 1814, Muhlenberg County, Kentucky) die?
questions.rationale: The census trail goes cold after 1870. No Kentucky death certificate is expected (statewide registration began 1911, decades after his likely death); the county estate administration is the primary death evidence.

items.rationale: With no death certificate expected pre-1911, the county estate administration (administrator's bond, settlement) brackets the death and is the primary evidence. Kentucky Probate Records, 1727-1990 covers Muhlenberg.
